Resolves #12228

Authored by GPT-5 (Codex Desktop). Session 87203e0b-c9ff-4a82-a67b-9a0dda760c32.
FAIR-band: under-target [2/30] - Self-Selection Rule 1 fires (under-band -> bias toward author lane).

Rewrites the README front-door from the older four-pillar / digital-organism scaffold to the #12225 / ADR 0018 canonical apex: Neo.mjs as a self-evolving software organism and professional end-to-end AI engineering team, with Brain (`/ai`) and Body (`/src`) as the two hemispheres beneath it.

Evidence: L1 (static README diff + apex/string checks + link-existence checks) -> L1 required (docs-only identity surface). No residuals.

## What changed

- The first bold sentence now names the canonical apex directly: `self-evolving software organism` plus `professional, end-to-end AI engineering team`.
- The opening now frames the cross-family team, shared memory, Active Hybrid GraphRAG, and lifecycle autonomy before the runtime mechanics.
- The former top-level `The Four Pillars` section is reshaped into `The Two Hemispheres`.
- The Brain section now leads as the Agent OS and contains the institution + evolution mechanism as Brain-internal subsections.
- The Body section now carries the application-engine and Neural Link / possession-interface story as supporting runtime capability, not the apex.
- The `Who This Is For` wording now filters audience through the two hemispheres instead of four co-equal pillars.

## Deltas from ticket

- No changes to dated metrics, VISION, benefits docs, generated SEO files, or portal surfaces. Those remain sibling lanes under #12225.
- The README still intentionally keeps Body/runtime discoverability because the engine is the adoption substrate; it is no longer the lead identity.

## Test Evidence

- `node -e ...` static check confirmed README includes:
  - `Neo.mjs is a self-evolving software organism`
  - `professional, end-to-end AI engineering team`
  - `## The Two Hemispheres`
  - `### 🧠 The Brain — The Agent OS`
  - `### 🤖 The Body — The Application Engine`
  - and no `## The Four Pillars` heading.
- Link-existence check passed for newly referenced docs:
  - `learn/benefits/AIEngineeringTeam.md`
  - `learn/agentos/NeuralLink.md`
  - `learn/benefits/ObjectPermanence.md`
  - `learn/benefits/OffTheMainThread.md`
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] README top renders with the organism/team apex before the badges/quickstart/adoption path.
